name: 8pc Clipped Jacquard Stripe Comforter Bedding Set - Threshold™
description:
Brighten up your bedroom oasis with the rich look and timeless style of the Whately Comforter Set from Threshold™. This multi-piece bedding set includes everything you need to transform your bedroom into a cozy haven that provides year-round comfort — all you need is your choice of sheets. The comforter is adorned with jacquard-woven stripes in mustard and light brown popping from the white backdrop to liven up your space with a vibrant splash. The solid-white reverse adds elegant style, and the two matching striped shams and two solid white shams complete the jacquard comforter set with a coordinated look. It also has two decorative pillows in solid white and mustard with a white woven pattern, as well as a solid bed skirt, to provide the perfect finishing touch to your bedscape.

We made it better so you can feel better. To keep you safe from harmful substances, this product has been independently tested and certified against a list of over 350 harmful chemicals according to strict STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® guidelines.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
